# CLI reference

These pages are generated from the `clap` command definitions by `cargo xtask doc-gen cli`. Do not edit them by hand.

`lightshuttle`: Lightweight dev orchestrator for polyglot teams

## Global options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `-f, --file <FILE>` | Path to the manifest. Overrides the upward discovery |

## Commands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [up](up.md) | Boot the stack and supervise it until interrupted |
| [down](down.md) | Stop every container managed by this project |
| [ps](ps.md) | List managed resources and their status |
| [logs](logs.md) | Stream logs of a single resource |
| [validate](validate.md) | Parse and validate the manifest without starting anything |
| [manifest](manifest.md) | Dump the resolved manifest to stdout as YAML |
| [restart](restart.md) | Restart a single managed resource through the running control plane. Requires `lightshuttle up` to be active in the same working directory so the discovery file `.lightshuttle/control.url` is present |
| [alias](alias.md) | Manage the optional `lsh` shell alias |
| [export](export.md) | Generate deployment artifacts from the manifest |
| [secrets](secrets.md) | Inspect `${env.*}` variable references in the manifest |
